MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-28-2022 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CCPC, INC. DBA GREEN DOOR'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS IS DENIED, AS THE COURT IS AUTHORIZED TO GRANT SUCH RELIEF ONLY IF IT GRANTS RELIEF "BASED ON AN ATTORNEY'S AFFIDAVIT OF FAULT." (CODE CIV. PROC. SEC. 473(B).) (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE DETAILS) COUNSEL FOR THE DEFENDANT IS TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING APPROVED AS TO FORM IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: SUZANNE R. BOLANOS, CLERK: W. TRUPEK, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO CSR# 8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. (302/SRB)

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jan-28-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Wendy Hillger, Esq., AD ASTRA LAW GROUP, LLP, (415) 795-3579, whillger@astralegal.com, for Plaintiff, EVENT HORIZON TECHNOLOGIES, INC.,
JOSHUA SAFRAN, ESQ., RUDDER LAW GROUP, LLP, (510) 576-6766, jsafran@rudderlawgroup.com. for Defendant, CCPC, Inc.
Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600,

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

DEFENDANT CCPC, INC. DBA GREEN DOOR MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND

Defendant CCPC, Inc. dba Green Door's motion to set aside default is granted.

Plaintiff's request for attorney's fees and costs is denied, as the court is authorized to grant such relief only if it grants relief "based on an attorney's affidavit of fault." (Code Civ. Proc. Sec. 473(b).)

(see word minutes for complete details)

Counsel is encouraged by the Court to meet and confer about the proposed answer that defendant attached as an exhibit to this motion.

Counsel for the Defendant is to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling that is approved as to form in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/SRB)
